title: Vežba 91

fillInTheBlank.sentence:
Sophie: Bob, could you tell me about your job and your BLANK in the office?

Bob: Of course, I'd be happy to. In my role, I have to meet project BLANK and BLANK the development team. I also can't disclose sensitive information to anyone outside the company.

Sophie: What about daily tasks?

Bob: Well, I have to attend team BLANK and provide progress reports, but I don't have to BLANK unless it's an urgent situation.

blanks.feedback: Obaveze ili zadaci koje je potrebno izvršiti.
Poslednji rok ili krajnja data kada nešto mora biti završeno.
Saraditi sa drugim ljudima kako bi se postigao cilj.
Sastanci gde ljudi diskutuju o poslu ili donose odluke.

description: Ovo je pregled svih razgovora koje ste nedavno pročitali.
instructions:
Napišite sledeće reči ili rečenice na pravo mesto:

responsibilities, work overtime, deadlines, meetings, i collaborate with.
